keyPoints: Introduction to sequential logic is crucial for digital circuits
Sequential circuits involve clock signals and memory elements
Latches store one bit of information at a time, flip-flops store multiple bits
Flip-flops can be either S-R (set-reset) or D (data) type
Latches are used for short-term memory, flip-flops for long-term memory
Synchronous and asynchronous storage elements are used in sequential circuits
